basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Young Professional II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) has officially announced the Young Professional II Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Eligible candidates aged between 21 and 45 years who hold Postgraduate qualifications in Nematology, Molecular Biology, Biotechnology, Genetics & Plant Breeding, Botany, relevant Life Sciences, or Graduate degrees in relevant Agricultural Sciences, Engineering, or Technology can submit their applications through Email. The last date for submission of applications is 21 days from the date of publication of the official notification. Direct links to down

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduates in Nematology/ Molecular Biology/ Biotechnology/ Genetics & Plant Breeding/ Botany/ any relevant discipline of life sciences or Graduate degree holders in relevant Agricultural Sciences/ Engineering/ Technology
qualification.details: Postgraduates in Nematology/ Molecular Biology/ Biotechnology/ Genetics & Plant Breeding/ Botany/ any relevant discipline of life sciences or Graduate degree holders in relevant Agricultural Sciences/ Engineering/ Technology.

selection_process: educational performance and/or relevant research experience Online/In-person Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR-IARI Young Professional II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21 days from publication (27-07-2026)
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR-IARI Young Professional II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21 days from publication (27-07-2026) Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICAR IARI Young Professional II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR-IARI Young Professional II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 27-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional II post?
faq.answer: Candidates should be Postgraduates in Nematology, Molecular Biology, Biotechnology, Genetics & Plant Breeding, Botany, or any relevant discipline of life sciences. Alternatively, Graduate degree holders in relevant Agricultural Sciences, Engineering, or Technology are also eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 45 years for all posts mentioned in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional II position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 42,000 per month for the Young Professional II post.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the ICAR-IARI Young Professional II job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Young Professional II post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their eligibility, academic performance, and relevant experience, followed by an online or in-person interview.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the ICAR- Indian Agricultural Research Institute.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ICAR-IARI located?
faq.answer: The ICAR- Indian Agricultural Research Institute is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110012.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a direct link to the PDF is provided.
